title: Flodesk vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Flodesk and Constant Contact. See pricing, features, ratings, and which email marketing tool suits your business best.
h1: Flodesk vs Constant Contact: Detailed Comparison
intro: Flodesk and Constant Contact are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Flodesk focuses on design-first marketing for creative brands, while Constant Contact emphasizes simplicity and multi-channel features for local businesses and nonprofits. Understanding their key differences will help you choose the right tool for your marketing needs.
choose_a_if: You prioritize beautiful, visually stunning email designs and want unlimited subscribers at a flat rate
You're a creative professional, photographer, or designer who needs templates tailored to visual marketing
You want to combine email with checkout forms and link-in-bio landing pages without extra costs
choose_b_if: You need affordable entry-level pricing and want to pay only for what you use
You require multi-channel marketing including SMS, social media ads, and event management
You're a nonprofit, local business, or e-commerce store looking for comprehensive built-in tools

faq.q: Is Flodesk better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: It depends on your priorities. Flodesk excels in design quality and simplicity with unlimited subscribers, earning higher ratings (4.8 vs 4.0 on G2). However, Constant Contact offers more features like SMS and social media ads at a lower starting price, making it better for feature-hungry businesses on tight budgets.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Flodesk or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Constant Contact has a lower starting price at $12/month compared to Flodesk's $38/month. However, Flodesk's flat-rate pricing means you get unlimited subscribers regardless of list size, while Constant Contact charges based on subscriber count, which could become more expensive as you grow.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to Flodesk?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support list imports, so you can migrate your subscribers. Most email marketing tools allow you to export your contacts as a CSV file and import them into Flodesk. Plan your transition during a natural billing cycle to minimize overlap and extra costs.
